@let greeting = 'café 🚀 𝌆';

{{ greeting }}

@let city = "東京"; @let total = price * quantity; @let fallback = user?.name ?? 'anonymous'; @let selected = items[index]; @let palette = ["red", 'green', `blue-${tone}`]; @let message = enabled ? 'ready' : 'waiting';

{{ message }}

@let typed = value as string; @let callable = format(city, total); @let astral = `symbol 𝌆 and rocket 🚀`;
{{ callable }}
